source: User-executed v3 notebook analyzed before v4 patch
diagnosis: Ontology retrieval worked, but Layer 2 selected overly generic or wrong canonical properties.
Layer 1 sometimes collapsed date and location into one broad relation expression.
Layer 3 counts were inflated by 21 mention-free relation vocabulary candidates.
Layer 2 called the LLM for ordinary nodes, increasing runtime.
P577 publication date was incorrectly attached to Athens metropolitan area.
v4_response: Structured one-pair relation instances at Layer 1.
Exact endpoint Layer 4 resolution with native fallback.
